data.body: Consideration: [Scope Boundary] plan-review/SKILL.md (lines 85, 90, 113) references scores (feasibility, completeness, yagni, codebase_alignment) for the PLAN review schema, not CODE review. When grepping for 'scores' across .md files, do NOT modify plan-review scoring — it is a separate system. Evaluate each match for which review system it belongs to.
